reviews.comment:
Los playeros fueron groseros al pedirle que me ayudaran a inflar la rueda. Respondiendo con desdén
Estaban charlando y riéndose a un lado en lugar de atender.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were rude when I asked them to help me inflate my tire. They responded dismissively. They were chatting and laughing off to the side instead of helping me.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención por parte de los playeros, empleados administrativos de grúas y baños impecables, me siento orgulloso de ser socio del ACA.

Excellent service from the beach attendants, the tow truck administrative staff, and the spotless restrooms. I'm proud to be an ACA member.
